methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Axibo AI is a seed-stage robotics and manufacturing company that has raised C$12M to date, founded by Ishaan Mehta. The comparable universe consists of 9 peers across the Robotics & Manufacturing sector: 1 public company (277810.KQ) and 8 private firms, including 1X Technologies, Divergent, Exotec, Locus Robotics, and Bedrock Robotics.

The peer-median method is not applicable to this valuation. While 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, filtering for stage-matched, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier comparables yielded fewer than three datapoints in each category—below the minimum threshold required for a defensible median. Applying an all-sector median would introduce excessive noise and obscure the specificity needed for seed-stage robotics valuations. No alternative triangulation methods could be applied with the available data.

The analysis therefore cannot support a specific valuation range at this time. The primary limitation is the scarcity of sufficiently comparable seed-stage robotics companies with public valuations or disclosed private funding rounds. To establish a robust valuation, additional comparable data would be required—either later-stage financing rounds from the identified peers, more granular public market multiples for the single listed comparable, or disclosure of valuations from additional seed or Series A robotics companies. Key uncertainties center on how seed-stage robotics companies trade relative to the broader sector multiples and whether the identified peers represent appropriate benchmarks for Axibo's specific technology and market position.
